Submitted At
{{ route.submitted_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z') if route.submitted_at else '—' }}
Actual Length (m)
{{ route.actual_length_meters or '—' }}
Submission ID

Revised Items

{% for item in route.line_items or [] %}
{{ item.description or item.item_type or 'Line item' }}
Qty {{ item.quantity }} at {{ item.unit_price }} = {{ item.amount }}

{% endif %}

No revised items were submitted.
{% endfor %}
